metadata.source_engine: V5.6 Numeric Context Enrichment for Exposure Replay
metadata.purpose: Re-attribute fixed V5.4 BALANCED research candidates with V5.6 numeric context and V5.7 macro context without changing rules.

evidence.reason: V5.8 is attribution-only; drivers are hypotheses, not formal exposure rules.

summary.key_read: Macro-enhanced attribution adds macro, market, and theme numeric context to fixed V5.4 BALANCED candidates; it improves diagnosis but remains attribution-only and does not justify mapper changes yet.
